chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1503 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.10.2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG Sindh has filed comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 5, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for petitioner does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
